rss.title: Israel and Hezbollah continue strikes despite ceasefire agreement
rss.snippet: Several people are reported killed in southern Lebanon, with the IDF saying it hit "Hezbollah terrorist targets" after the group fired over 50 projectiles at Israeli forces.

rss.title: Zelensky stripped of highest Polish honour over WW2 name of army unit
rss.snippet: Ukraine has denounced the move, calling it a "strategic mistake" and "disrespectful".

rss.title: Tourist dies in Dominican Republic luxury resort fire
rss.snippet: Nearly 1,700 people were evacuated from the huge blaze at Viva Wyndham Dominicus Beach in Bayahibe, a popular resort town on the Caribbean coast.

arxiv_papers.title: Poverty traps are rare, but trappedness isn't
arxiv_papers.snippet: The persistence of poverty is not well explained by who is poor. We argue the relevant object of measurement is trappedness--expected escape time from deprivation--which varies systematically across institutional environments and is invisible to standard poverty indices. Using Markov chains estimate

arxiv_papers.title: Measuring the depth of multidimensional poverty with ordinal data
arxiv_papers.snippet: This paper proposes a positional poverty gap measure of multidimensional poverty within the Alkire-Foster counting framework. The measure captures the depth of deprivations even when indicators are ordinal, unlike the standard poverty gap, which requires cardinal variables. The proposed method draws

Because behind the acid blood and jump scares is an even more insidious horror: a single employer with unchecked power.
